props.title: Classification of Upper Limb Motor Movements Using EEG Signals
props.overview: Currently researching a deep learning approach to classify upper limb motor movement using electroencephalogram signal data for brain-computer interface applications.

props.title: Vision Transformer Embedded Video Anomaly Detection with Attention Driven Recurrence
props.overview: Researched a real-time anomaly detection system using Vision Transformers and an attention-enhanced network in long surveillance footage.

props.title: A Deep Learning based Approach for Automated Defect Detection of Fabrics in Garment Production Line
props.overview: Researched and implemented a deep learning solution for identifying and localizing defects in fabrics, using the YOLOv8.

props.title: Combined Support Vector Machine and Gradient Boosting Decision Tree Framework for efficient snoRNA disease association prediction
props.overview: Researched a novel machine learning approach for predicting the correlation between various snoRNA and diseases in human body using combined SVM and GBDT framework.

props.title: A Deep Learning Approach to Assess Password Strength, Compromise Likelihood, and Time-to-Crack Estimation
props.overview: Researched a GPT-2 based deep learning model for password strength estimation via sequence analysis and perplexity scoring on real-world leaked datasets

props.title: A Detailed Energy Footprint Evaluation of Python and R in Computationally Intensive Statistical and Machine Learning Tasks
props.overview: Researched a novel approach to effectively measure the energy consumption and energy footprint for statistical and machine learning tasks of major operating systems using Python and R language.

props.title: Ameliorating Random Forest Performance through Data Clustering for Big Data Classification
props.overview: Researched combining Random Forest with K-Means clustering to improve classification performance for Big Data mining applications.
